items.headline: Game Recap: 76ers 109, Celtics 100
items.description: The Philadelphia 76ers defeated the Boston Celtics, 109-100, in Game 7 to win the series 4-3. Joel Embiid led the way with 34 points, 12 rebounds, and six assists, while Tyrese Maxey added 30 points, a playoff career-high 11 rebounds, and seven assists. Jaylen Brown led Boston with 33 points and nine rebounds in the loss.
